design_notes.power_rails: VDD, VDDA typically 3.3V. VDDH and VDDL can be connected to VDD for internal regulator operation or specific external supplies. All VSS pins must be connected to ground.
design_notes.required_passives: Numerous decoupling capacitors (e.g., 0.1uF, 1uF) on all VDD and VDDA pins to GND. A 100nF cap is typical for each major power rail, placed close to the pin. For crystal: two loading capacitors (e.g., 10pF-18pF) and series resistor (if required, consult crystal datasheet) on XL1/XL2. Pull-up resistor (e.g., 10K) on RESET_N.
design_notes.swd_connections: SWDIO, SWDCLK, RESET_N, VDD (for voltage sensing), and GND are required for SWD programming. RESET_N needs an external pull-up. VDD on the SWD header acts as VTG.
design_notes.crystal_requirements: 32 MHz crystal with appropriate loading capacitors (typically 12pF to 18pF for a standard 32MHz crystal) between XL1/XL2 and ground. Consult crystal datasheet for exact values.
